notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed directly supports that 夜天狼君 is considering secretly contacting Heaven's Court (天庭) to defect, which is private knowledge not known to his ally 寒灰仙姑 or 冰晶仙王. This is a hidden motive/plan fact. whoKnows includes 夜天狼君 and 夜治 (who he discussed with). whoDoesNotKnow includes 寒灰仙姑 and 冰晶仙王 as they are not informed.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
夜天狼君不愿和异族绑在一条战船上，考虑暗中接触天庭投靠中洲。观察到其与寒灰仙姑商定共同进退的行为，可推断其寻求盟友以应对局势。但投靠天庭的意图是直接陈述而非推断，故只取共同进退作为observedMotive。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
夜天狼君作为夜狼洞天首领，考虑暗中接触天庭投靠中洲，不愿与异族绑在一起，这构成夜狼洞天的战略抉择压力。夜治作为夜狼洞天蛊仙参与商议，表明这是集体决策而非个人情绪。压力轴为'投靠天庭的抉择'，属于reputation/geography类压力。
IF export filter quarantined 10 legacy old-schema branches.
Faction pressure subject filter quarantined 1 pressure candidates under policy reviewable.
